headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill issued a press release announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: Earnings releases are highly material as they provide the definitive update on quarterly and annual financial performance. Investors and analysts will focus on the accompanying conference call for insights into same-store sales growth, margin resilience, and forward-looking guidance for 2026.
key_figures: Fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
Conference call scheduled for 4:30 pm Eastern time on February 3, 2026
Matthew R. Bush, Vice President, Controller
